Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Encounter Records RIFs Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.7 32 

CLM_LTST_CLM_IND 

LABEL: Latest Claim Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates if the record is the latest action. 

SHORT NAME: CLM_LTST_CLM_IND 

LONG NAME: CLM_LTST_CLM_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Integrated Data Repository (IDR) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: Y = Latest action and the record could be a
